rows.reviewerOwnedOcrTextExcerpt: Visible cover text identifies The Brooks Encyclopedia of Chart Patterns, Part 3 of 16, with classifications from D to F.
rows.reviewerOwnedVisualObservation: The page is a cover slide with large title typography, author attribution, and a right-side chart motif showing a sharp decline and rebound.
rows.paraphrasedTeachingConcept: Original paraphrase, not copied: this row establishes source identity and taxonomy range for the D-to-F chart-pattern encyclopedia section.
rows.futureLossDecision: Do not use future-loss acceptance here; retain this row for OCR and reviewer confirmation before any module merge or folder-removal decision.
rows.evidenceLimitations: Cover evidence only; route for source map and taxonomy coverage rather than direct lesson content.

rows.relativePath: 5、阿布图表百科（学完视频再看，特别多）/0、Encyclopedia of Chart Patterns/Encyclopedia_Part 3_385D-F.pdf
rows.reviewerOwnedOcrTextExcerpt: Visible slide title and notes describe double-top bear-flag attempts that stop working once the chart has transitioned into a trading-range context.
rows.reviewerOwnedVisualObservation: The chart begins with a strong decline, then shifts into overlapping sideways movement with several red-highlighted flag attempts, descending guide lines, and a moving-average line.
rows.paraphrasedTeachingConcept: Original paraphrase, not copied: this row routes to bear-flag failure, trend-to-range transition, and context-change literacy in historical chart review.
rows.futureLossDecision: Do not use future-loss acceptance here; retain this row for OCR and reviewer confirmation before any module merge or folder-removal decision.
rows.evidenceLimitations: Annotated chart evidence; any tactical implication must be neutralized and verified by OCR and reviewer confirmation before module merge.

completionRule: This template is complete when all 85 Wave 5 PDF representative page samples are present as blank reviewer-owned OCR, visual-semantic, and future-loss decision input rows and all release, write, module-merge, and source-deletion gates remain closed.
boundary: Course 5 Wave 5 PDF AI visual review batch 005 is private reviewer-facing education operations material. It records page-level visual observations and visible text cues for twelve Wave 5 PDF samples so they can receive later human confirmation and OCR review. It does not complete OCR, replace human approval, merge content into learner-facing modules, approve source-folder removal, approve learner-facing release, copy private source wording, provide stock recommendations, live signals, return promises, execution instructions, automation, write authorization, or production readiness.
